name: Pineapple Chess Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the crushed pineapple and sugar.
2. Add cornstarch and coconut to the mixture.
3. Stir in eggs one at a time until well combined.
4. Fold in melted margarine and vanilla extract.
5. Pour the batter into a prepared pie dish.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for the required time, or until done.
